productDisplayName: ADIDAS Women's Royal Freshgold Purple Socks
description: CompositionAnkle length terry pad size socks in royal purple and orange with comfort bandWash careHand wash or machine wash Stylish and colourful, these purple ankle length socks from adidas are made with a comfort, dry Fit. The comfort band ensures it stays in place, while the terry fabric keeps your feet dry at all times. The colours add an edge of feminity making it a great wear with walking shoes and to the gym as well.
